raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz winnu Netchkibsti-
has un pehz winnu Pahrkahp-
schanahm efinu es winneem dar-
rijs/ un efinu fanu Watgu no
teein apflehpis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ta fakka tas
Kungs KUNGS : Ocu gribbu
es Jehkaba Zeetunneekus attat
atwest/ un apschehloschohs pahr
wiffu Israëta Nammu/ un es
atreepschohs manna Wahrdn
Swehtschanas pehz.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee nefiibs fanu Kan.
nu un wiffu fanu Pahrkahp-
schanu/ ar ko tee prett mann irr
pahrkahpuscht / kad tee fanwa
Semmê drohschi dshwoja/ un
neweens bija/ fas tohs istruh-
zinaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad es tohs bubschu at-
weddis no teem Zaudim/ un ja-
pulzinaajs tohs no winzu Ec-
naidneeku Walstein / un es pee
teem jwehtihts tapschu preeffch
dauds Pagazn Azziin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tee fajuttibs / ka es
efinu tas KUNGS winnu
Deews/ fas es tohs efinu lizzie
aiswest starp teemi Paganeem/
bet tohs attat japulzinaajs winzu
Semmê/ un ne efinu neweenu
no teem tur wairs atlizzinaajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir es fanu Waigu no
teeu wairs ne apfleipfhu/ kad
es fanu Garru pahr Israeta
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XL. Nodalla.
Ezekiels tobz zaur weenu Deewa Parah
nu Israëfa Semmê westet 1. Re-
weenu Wihrn ar weenu Aufli un meh
Rihkti mehrojam to ahrga Muhri t
na Deewa Namma: 3. Un gittus K
rus: 17/ 28/ 44/ 48.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jwidefinits peektâ G
Dâ muhfas Aiswe-
uas/ ta Gadda Ee
kumâ/ definita Deena tahs M
nes zettorta padefmita Gad
pehz ka tas Pillsfahts btja
kauts. Tai pascha Deena
ta KUNGA Rohka us ma
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wedde manni turp/
Deewa Parahdischanahin i
de wiꞥſch manni eekich Isr
Semmes. Un likke manni
weenn lohti angstu Kaluu /
us to bija tas ta ka w
Pilsfahtaustaisijums prett
nas Widdus puff.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad wiꞥſch manni
turp weddis/ rangt/ tad
weens Wihrs/ ka Eihints
redsans/ itt ka no Warra
winna Rohka bija weens li
Auklis / un weena mehr
Rihkte / un wiꞥſch stab
Wahrtis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Wihrs fazztia
man: Tu Zilweka Behrns/
tajs ar tawahtm Azzin/ un t
fi ar tawahtm Aufim/ un
wehra wiffu/ ko es tew re
schu / jo tapehz effi tu fc
wests/ ka es tew to rahdittu/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
